title: Yesterday’s Dark Red / Marketplace Shanty
overview: As Hakumei and Mikochi go on with their daily lives they find little wonders of their world, and learn to find joy in each other’s company.

title: The Two Songstresses / The Glass Lamp / A Cup of Coffee
overview: Mikochi is chosen to be a songstress and she must learn how to deal with the new attention. Meanwhile, an unexpected gift arrives.

title: Starlit Sky and Ponkan / Work Day
overview: An unfortunate incident leaves Hakumei and Mikochi without a home. Later, Hakumei is hard at work when suddenly trouble arises.

title: Work Day 2 / Horned Owls and Old Tales
overview: Konju and Mikochi enjoy each other’s company while baking and crafting. Later, a usual trip to the mountains take a dangerous turn for the worst.

title: The Association’s Work Site / Large Stones and Joint Stones
overview: After a landslide causes a stone wall to collapse, Hakumei tries to lend a helping hand. Will Hakumei’s hard work and dedication get her noticed?

title: The Egg Beautician / A Day Off / The Egg Beautician — Day 2
overview: Hakumei finds an egg-shaped house with an unexpected resident, and the surprises continue when Iwashi agrees to go on an outing with the girls.

title: A Ladder in the Tree / The Metropolitan Lifestyle / Photo of a Smile
overview: A ladder above Hakumei and Mikochi’s home leads to many mysteries. One of them is an unexpected new resident that differs from the rest…

title: A Long Day
overview: The Honey House is home to many residents who aren’t too fond of newcomers. Despite this, Konju plans to host a concert there which causes a bit of trouble for the girls.

title: Rhythm of the River Bottom / Dry Goods of the Stubborn
overview: Hakumei and Mikochi help Sen with important underwater research and later they feel inspired to design a new outfit for a friend.

title: Hot Bamboo Bath / Daikon and Pipes
overview: There’s nothing more relaxing than a day at the spa even if it’s followed by some unexpected company!

title: Overnight Train / Rain and Tenkara
overview: All aboard! Hakumei and Mikochi take a train to enjoy some fishing and find that the fish are harder to catch than they first thought.

title: Memory of Dark Red Hair
overview: On the way to the Makinata’s pioneering festival, Hakumei makes an effort to see some old friends and Mikochi learns about Hakumei’s mysterious past.
